title: East Anglia One North and East Anglia Two Offshore Windfarms: post-consent condition discharge, Planning Act 2008
body: "Date of Decision  7 February 2025  Company/location   ScottishPower RenewablesScottishPower House320 Vincent StGlasgowG2 5AD   Type of Project  Post-consent condition discharge of the East Anglia One North Offshore Wind Farm Order 2022 and the East Anglia Two Offshore Wind Farm Order 2022, as made under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum Output  N/A  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
